name: ExtensionSubstanceDefinition_SourceMaterial_Part
title: R5: An anatomical origin of the source material within an organism (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `SubstanceDefinition.sourceMaterial.part` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`SubstanceDefinition.sourceMaterial.part` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `SubstanceDefinition.sourceMaterial.part` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`
*  R4B: `SubstanceDefinition.sourceMaterial.part` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `SubstanceDefinition.sourceMaterial.part` has a context of SubstanceSpecification.sourceMaterial based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `SubstanceSpecification`.
Element `SubstanceDefinition.sourceMaterial.part` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
